final:
module shift_reg_3bit(
  input clk,
  input serial_in,
  output reg [2:0] parallel_out
);

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    parallel_out <= {serial_in, parallel_out[2:1]};
  end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      parallel_out <= {parallel_out[2], parallel_out[1], serial_in};
    end
  end

endmodule
